perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a red bomber jacket and blue hoodie holds a coffee cup in a brightly lit clothing store, looking around with a surprised expression. (2) A woman appears, showing a white down jacket and then a black vest on a mannequin, pointing at the design details. (3) The woman holds up an oversized black long-sleeved shirt and demonstrates how to style it by tying another shirt around the waist/chest. (4) She holds up a grey tiered skirt and moves it to show the fabric. (5) The man examines denim pants and then picks up a white hoodie and a mustard-yellow sweater, reacting with exaggerated facial expressions and gestures to the low prices shown on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat pop-style background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, excited male voice begins narrating loudly. (2) A cheerful female voice joins the conversation, discussing specific clothing items. (3) Sounds of hangers clinking and fabric rustling are audible beneath the voices. (4) Several cartoon-style sound effects (SFX) such as 'dings' and 'swishes' are used to highlight price reveals and transitions. (5) The man's voice becomes increasingly loud and shocked towards the end, punctuated by short bursts of laughter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '2990日幣' (2990 Yen) appearing with price conversions. (2) Decorative Hook: '「平價到爆」' (Extremely Affordable) in bold font. (3) Effect Text: '「我去看我的尺寸」' (I'm going to look for my size) appearing near the woman. (4) Emotional Hook: '我都沒在看價格！！' (I haven't even looked at the prices!!) in large yellow font. (5) Shock Hook: '一件帽T才300塊!!!' (A hoodie for only 300 bucks!!!) with red emphasis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Item Showcase -> Shocking Price Reveal -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator, 1 female companion/host, and 1 female passer-by/shopper in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man in a red 'HUMAN MADE' style bomber jacket and a blue hoodie; a woman with hair tied up in a bun wearing a beige and navy quilted jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern retail environment with racks of clothing, mannequins wearing layered outfits, and white walls with signage like 'GLOBAL WORK' and 'Right-On'.
visual_scene_and_style.season: Winter (based on clothing items like down jackets)

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cuts synced with music beats

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Item Showcase -> Price Breakdown -> Climax Reaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote specific Japanese clothing brands (GLOBAL WORK, Right-On) by demonstrating the high quality/style of their items relative to their surprisingly low prices, targeting budget-conscious travelers or fashion enthusiasts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Frequent showcasing of store logos, detailed price displays, and positive commentary on item value.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy 'sticker-style' text overlays and the creator's signature exaggerated reactions to prices.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video is a typical 'Shopping Haul' or 'Store Tour' snippet optimized for short-form social media consumption with high visual and auditory stimulation.
